modeled: fringe feeds exact core in one step
puncture equals sheet shadow in current model
open: retained iff sheet-legal as causal bridge theorem
puncture = sheet shadow beyond the current bridge model
full causal theorem beyond the current bridge model

export_note: This artifact is a machine-generated theorem-status ledger. It distinguishes verified laws, modeled bridge results, and open beyond-model statements.
